# Meterless

> The local-first context stack for agentic AI. This repository contains engine implementation specs (AGENTS.md-driven, not runtime libraries), architecture docs, product documentation, and the project narrative. Everything here is Apache 2.0. Product application binaries are proprietary and live in per-app repos.

## Folder map

- /engines/hmem/ : H-MEM, hierarchical memory and durable context. Self-contained spec with AGENTS.md, docs, examples, evals, workshops.
- /engines/world-model/ : World Model, user/task/environment state modeling. Self-contained spec.
- /engines/markovian/ : Markovian, reasoning compression and next-action logic. Self-contained spec.
- /engines/scout-intent/ : Scout Intent, intent detection, risk guarding, routing, signed execution contracts. Self-contained spec with a runnable eval harness.
- /docs/architecture/ : why Meterless exists, local-first agentic context, stack overview.
- /docs/engines/ : one overview page per engine, linking into the spec folders.
- /docs/products/gaia/ : Gaia documentation. Gaia is the personal agent workspace.
- /docs/products/relay/ : Relay documentation. Relay is the agent execution layer.
- /docs/products/swarms/ : Swarms documentation. Swarms is the divergent generation layer.
- /docs/agent-ready/ : using this repo with Claude Code and Cursor.
- /docs/community/ : hackathon guide.
- /examples/memory-compounding-research/ : runnable cross-engine demo (H-MEM + Markovian, mock LLM, no keys).
- /templates/agentathon-starter/ : hackathon starter, a memory notebook agent on the H-MEM reference.

## Canonical docs

- https://github.com/meterless/meterless/blob/main/README.md

## Products (installers, proprietary)

- https://github.com/meterless/gaia/releases/latest
- https://github.com/meterless/relay/releases/latest
- https://github.com/meterless/swarms/releases/latest

## Focused clone of one engine

npx degit meterless/meterless/engines/hmem my-hmem
